name: Ding Files Are Done
author: Railblade
description: Ding! Files are done downloading. System notification with Open File / Show Folder buttons whenever a download finishes, an icon based on file type, a choice of sound effects (Standard, Special, or your own upload) with volume control, and an option to hide Chrome's download shelf/bubble.

action.default_title: Ding Files Are Done — click to configure
